tagline: Science you can trust, health you can feel

typography.heading: Clean geometric sans-serif, authoritative and modern

visual.photography: Clean product photography, science-meets-lifestyle, infographic-ready layouts
visual.lighting_default: Clean white light with subtle blue tones, sharp product definition, modern studio
visual.style: Authoritative, clean, science-backed, modern, trustworthy without being sterile

voice.language_mix: English 85% + Bahasa Malaysia 15%, clear and precise

personas: Professional who researches supplements before buying
Fitness enthusiast who trusts science over trends
Doctor or pharmacist recommending to patients

motion_language.name: Lab to Life
motion_language.vibe: From scientific rigour to everyday wellness
motion_language.audio: Subtle electronic ambient, soft data beeps, capsule clicking, clean pour sounds
motion_language.motion: Clean data overlay graphics, microscopic zoom transitioning to product shot, capsule falling in slow-mo, molecular visualization to lifestyle reveal
motion_language.language: Precision meets warmth — science that speaks human, data that tells a story

tiktok.camera_movement: Microscopic zoom out to product, data overlay slide-in, clean product spin
tiktok.typical_use: Quick science facts, ingredient breakdowns, myth-busting clips

instagram.stories: Infographic cards, ingredient spotlights with research citations, quiz polls on health facts
instagram.feed_carousel: 9:16 portrait images, clean product shots with data overlays, before/after research visuals
instagram.reels_carousel: 9:16 portrait motion clips, lab-to-product transitions, science animation sequences

youtube_shorts.camera_movement: Macro on ingredient, data graphic overlay, zoom out to lifestyle context
youtube_shorts.typical_use: Science explainers, supplement education, research-backed health tips
